title: Plant and procedure for the abatement of pollutants on a gaseous flow
abstract: A process and a plant (10) for the abatement of pollutants on a gaseous flow are described; the plant (10) includes: a suction system (11); a zeolite insufflation system (20); and a gaseous flow emission system (18), in which the suction system (11) comprises a filtering system (14) for retaining the zeolite powders which have adsorbed the pollutants and comprising filter media of the fabric bag filter type; the suction system (11) includes suction means and the system (10) uses chabasite-based zeolite.
claims:
Claims 1. Plant (10) for the abatement of pollutants on a gaseous flow comprising: an aspiration system (11) configured to aspirate the pollutants generated by a production plant (12) preventing them from dispersing into the environment; - a zeolite insufflation system (20) connected to the suction system (11) and configured to introduce the zeolite into the suction system (11); and a gaseous flow emission system (18), connected to the suction system (11) and configured for the emission into the atmosphere of the gaseous flow treated with zeolite; characterized in that: the suction system (11) comprises a filtering system (14) positioned between the insufflation system (20) and the emission system (18) and configured to retain the zeolite powders that have adsorbed the pollutants, the filtering system (14) comprising filter media of the fabric bag filter type, - the suction system (11) comprises suction means connected to a suction pipe (15) and to an 

aspirator (16), the suction pipe (15) being connected to a compressed air line for introducing air into the suction pipe (15), and - the plant (10) uses chabasite-based zeolite. 2. Plant (10) for the abatement of pollutants on a gaseous flow according to claim 1, characterized in that the zeolite insufflation system (20) comprises loading means (21) configured to contain the zeolite and comprising advancement means (22) of an amount of zeolite from the loading means (21) to the suction system (11). 3. Plant (10) for the abatement of pollutants on a gaseous flow according to claim 2, characterized in that the emission system (18) of the gaseous flow comprises a measuring system configured to detect the concentration of pollutants leaving the emission system (18) so as to dose the amount of zeolite moved by the advancement means (22) on the basis of the concentration of pollutants detected by the measuring system. 4. Plant (10) for the abatement of pollutants on a gaseous flow according to claim 1, characterized in that the zeolite has a particle size between 10 micrometres and 4 mm. 5. Plant (10) for the abatement of pollutants on a 

gas flow according to claim 4, characterized in that the zeolite has a particle size between 20 micrometres and 100 micrometres. 6. Plant (10) for the abatement of pollutants on a gaseous flow comprising: - an aspiration system (11) configured to aspirate the pollutants generated by a production plant (12) preventing them from dispersing into the environment; and - a gaseous flow emission system (18), connected to the suction system (11) and configured for the emission of the gaseous flow treated with zeolite into the atmosphere, the gaseous flow emission system (18) comprising a fixed bed of zeolite configured to adsorb the pollutants of the gaseous flow coming from the suction system (11) before it is emitted into the atmosphere; characterized in that: the suction system (11) comprises a filtering system (14) configured to retain the zeolite powders which have adsorbed the pollutants, the filtering system (14) comprising filtering means of the fabric bag filter type, - the suction system (11) comprises suction means connected to a suction pipe (15) and to an 

aspirator (16), the suction pipe (15) being connected to a compressed air line for introducing air into the suction pipe (15), and - the plant (10) uses chabasite-based zeolite. 7. Process for the abatement of pollutants on a gaseous flow with a plant (10) for the abatement of pollutants on a gaseous flow according to any one of claims 1 to 5, comprising the following steps: - a suction step, by means of the suction system (11), of the pollutants generated in the production plant (12); - a step for introducing compressed air into the suction system (11); a step of insufflation, by means of the insufflation system (20), of an amount of zeolite in the suction system (11) so that it mixes in co current with the gaseous flow and adsorbs the pollutants; - a step of filtering the gaseous flow, by means of the filtering system (14), in order to retain the zeolite powders that have been blown in and have adsorbed the pollutants together with the powders of other types present in the aspirated gaseous flow, avoiding that the powders are dispersed into the atmosphere through the emission system (18); 

 an emission step of the gaseous flow filtered into the atmosphere, by means of the emission system (18); a step for detecting the concentration of pollutants leaving the emission system (18) in order to dose the amount of zeolite based on the concentration of pollutants detected. 8. Process for the abatement of pollutants on a gaseous flow according to claim 7, characterized in that the insufflation step includes the following sub-steps: - a sub-step of loading the zeolite onto loading means (21); - a sub-step of advancing an amount of zeolite from the loading means (21) to the suction system (11), the amount of zeolite being determined on the basis of the results of the detection step.
